title: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]40[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
options.requires: At least 40 Gold; only available if damaged

options.title: Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!
options.requires: At least 40 Gold; only available if potion slot open

conditions: All players must have at least 120 Gold
notes:
This is a looping event where you grab items from a magical conveyor belt. Each grab costs [gold]40 Gold[/gold] (except [green]Golden Fysh[/green], which gives [blue]75 Gold[/blue] for free, losing no gold). The event continues until you choose to leave or run out of gold.

[blue]Dish Selection Mechanics[/blue]: Each time a new dish is rolled:
- Every 5th grab: always [gold]Seapunk Salad[/gold]
- Otherwise: weighted random from available dishes (same dish never appears twice in a row)

[blue]Availability and Weights[/blue]: For the random roll, dishes are selected from a weighted pool:
- [gold]Caviar[/gold] (weight 6): Always in pool
- [gold]Spicy Snappy[/gold] (weight 3): Always in pool
- [gold]Jelly Liver[/gold] (weight 3): Always in pool
- [gold]Fried Eel[/gold] (weight 3): Always in pool
- [gold]Suspicious Condiment[/gold] (weight 3): Only in pool if you have an open Potion slot
- [gold]Clam Roll[/gold] (weight 6): Only in pool if your current HP is less than Max HP
- [gold]Golden Fysh[/gold] (weight 1): Only in pool after your first grab
- [gold]Seapunk Salad[/gold]: Guaranteed (weight 0) on every 5th grab, not subject to random selection

[blue]Key Mechanics[/blue]: [green]Golden Fysh[/green] is the only way to gain Gold in this event. When you run out of Gold, the grab option becomes locked (showing "Broke" - You could eat more but you are out of Gold) and you must either wait for [green]Golden Fysh[/green] or Leave the event. [gold]Observe the Chef[/gold] is only available on the initial choice and immediately ends the event.
